name: gridwire
description: Gridwire by Ghostwire Systems — Discord bot that watches the NFL schedule across multiple providers and posts changes (flex moves, postponements, schedule release) to a channel
author: Ghostwire Systems

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/diff.js && node --check src/format.js && node --check src/providers/index.js && node --check src/providers/common.js && node --check src/providers/espn.js && node --check src/providers/nflverse.js && node --check src/providers/balldontlie.js
